series_metadata.series_description: Records that document the process to select an operator for a facility. Records may include: applications and supporting documentation; applicant information records provided to the selection panel; facility announcement; selection scoring form; and, other miscellaneous documentation acquired during the selection process.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Maintain records at least ninety (90) days from date Operator is chosen and accepts facility. when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Maintain records at least ninety (90) days from date Operator is chosen and accepts facility. when no longer of administrative value. A Certificate of Disposal is required when destroying these records
